ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Sends a natural-language message to an Agentforce agent and returns the agent's reply, so an MCP client or another agent can delegate work to the org's agent.
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: InvokeAgentAction
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: 3.0.0 info: title: InvokeAgentAction description: Sends a natural-language message to an Agentforce agent and returns the agent's reply, so an MCP client or another agent can delegate work to the org's agent. version: '1.0.0' servers: - url: /services/aura-controllers/custom paths: /askAgent: post: operationId: askAgent summary: Ask an Agentforce agent description: Sends a natural-language message to an Agentforce agent and returns its reply. Use to ask an agent to do something on the user's behalf — create or update records, look something up, or answer a question — by describing the request in plain language. Pass back the returned sessionId to continue the same conversation. x-sfdc: agent: action: publishAsAgentAction: true requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object required: - userMessage properties: userMessage: title: User Message description: The natural-language message to send to the agent, exactly as an end user would phrase it. Required. type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: true isUserInput: true sessionId: title: Session Id description: Optional. The sessionId returned by a previous call. Pass it back to continue the same conversation. Omit to start a new session. type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: false isUserInput: true agentApiName: title: Agent API Name description: Optional. API name of the agent to invoke. Omit to use the default agent (Case_CRUD_Agent). type: string x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: false isUserInput: true responses: '200': description: The agent's reply and the sessionId to reuse for the next turn. content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/AgentReply' components: schemas: AgentReply: type: object properties: agentResponse: type: string description: The agent's natural-language reply to the user message. sessionId: type: string description: The conversation sessionId. Pass it back on the next call to continue the same multi-turn conversation.
